rulings.Case Title: LESLIE MATHEWS VS. WILLIAM F GARLOCK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Disqualify James E Toothman & The Lawfirm Of James E Toothman & Associates As Counsel For Pltfs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 12, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANTS TONI SUTHERLAND AND ALTA INVESTMENT GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Disqualify James E. Toothman & The Lawfirm Of James E. Toothman & Associates As Counsel For Plaintiffs. MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED INDICATES THAT DEFENDANT SUTHERLAND HAD A REASONABLE EXPECTATION THAT AN ATTORNEY-CLIENT RELATIONSHIP WAS ESTABLISHED AND THAT THE PENDING AND FORMER MATTER BEAR A SUBTANTIAL RELATIONSHIP TO ONE ANOTHER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: NORMAN JAMES BELISLE VS. DAVID A. SHERMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 12, 2011, line 2, PLAINTIFF NORMAN BELISLE'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses. MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS DENIED. WHILE DEFENDANT HAS RAISED OBJECTIONS IN MANY OF THE REQUESTS, THEY HAVE ALSO SUFFICIENTLY ANSWERED THEM AS WELL. THE OBJECTIONS ARE UNDERSTANDABLE IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S OVERLY BROAD QUESTIONS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: 781 BEACH STREET PROPERTY L.P., A CALIFORNIA VS. PETER REMEDIOS, AN INDIVIDUAL ALSO KNOWN AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 12, 2011, line 9, DEFENDANTS REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH, INC., A CALIFORNIA, CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS, INC., A CALIFORNIA, PETER REMEDIOS, REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, INC., FORMALLY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST PETER REMEDIOS, AN INDIVIDUAL, AND CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD HOW THESE PARTIES WERE INVOLVED IN THE BREACH OF CONTRACT OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT, FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST REMEDIOS SIEMBIEDA INC.; REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, AND REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH. =(302/LMG)
